title: cacalia forrestii
intro: Cacalia forrestii is a species of flowering plant in the family Compositae, also known as the aster or daisy family. It is commonly found in China and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, coughs, and digestive problems, with its extracts showing potential in reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Cacalia forrestii is typically prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, with the dried roots and leaves being used in traditional Chinese medicine.
